headline: Is Interactive Brokers (IBKR) Using Crypto Integration To Deepen Its Multi‑Asset Moat In Europe?
summary: Interactive Brokers Group recently expanded its platform by enabling eligible EEA clients to trade 11 major crypto-assets alongside traditional securities, and by allowing existing holders to transfer supported cryptocurrencies into IBKR-linked accounts without liquidating their positions. By integrating crypto trading and deposits with multi-asset brokerage tools and relatively low, transparent commissions, Interactive Brokers is positioning itself as a single, consolidated hub for...
